description_long: This is a single-story modern house with a flat roof and a spacious, rectangular layout. The exterior features a mix of white and light gray walls, large windows, and wooden accent panels, giving it a contemporary appearance. The property is surrounded by a white fence and includes landscaped green lawns, several trees, and flowering shrubs. There is a visible backyard area with open grassy space and a cylindrical water tank in one corner. The front entryway is defined by a small porch and a pathway leading to the main door, flanked by greenery. The house has multiple access points and a variety of window sizes, providing ample natural light throughout the interior.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, white and gray exterior, large windows, and landscaped gardens enclosed by a white fence.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, porch, pathway, and a mix of trees and shrubs along the front fence.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the backyard lawn, water tank, and the back facade with fewer windows and more privacy.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the length of the house, a row of flowering trees, and the backyard area with open green space.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing additional garden space, a prominent tree, and the side entrance with visible wooden accents.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and varied sizes
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a small porch, single door, pathway, and is framed by landscaping and a white fence.
